description_long: This is a rectangular wicker picnic basket with a sturdy wooden frame along the top and bottom edges, providing structural support and a classic appearance. The basket's body is woven from light-colored natural fibers, creating a textured and slightly translucent surface. Each of the shorter sides features a rectangular cut-out handle, reinforced with additional weaving for comfortable carrying. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for holding food, utensils, or personal items. The weave is tight and uniform, giving the basket a robust yet lightweight feel. There are no visible decorative elements or a lid, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A rectangular wicker picnic basket with a wooden frame and woven fiber body, featuring cut-out handles on the short sides and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide woven surface and the wooden frame along the top and bottom edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular cut-out handle and the basket's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with the same woven pattern and wooden framing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cut-out handle and the basket's depth.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed rectangular cut-out handles integrated into the short sides, reinforced with woven wicker.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight weave with consistent spacing and a uniform, basket-like texture.
